warnings: No email address detected. Bots will struggle to match matching profile.
Contact number is missing. Recruitment agencies prefer direct call validation.
Skills collection is extremely sparse. Injected keyword indexes will be poor.
Summary section is somewhat generic and lacks a compelling personal elevator pitch.
Database scaling processes or Cloud deployment logs are under-indexed.

scoringBreakdown.formattingFeedback: Professional structure is fully correct. Section headers are easily parseable by standard corporate bots.
scoringBreakdown.verbFeedback: Solid use of action verbs but retains several simple words like 'Worked' or 'Collaborated' which can be further elevated.
scoringBreakdown.completenessFeedback: All core sections are fully represented. Missing a section for Cloud or DevOps tools.

summaryFeedback.original: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience architecting highly scalable web applications. Proven track record of optimizing backend API performance by 30% and leading cross-functional, highly collaborative agile core squads.
summaryFeedback.improved: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience architecting highly scalable web applications. Proven track record of optimizing backend API performance by 30% and leading cross-functional, highly collaborative agile core squads.
summaryFeedback.justification: AI summary optimization fully applied to active draft.

bulletImprovements.original: Worked on backend APIs using Node.js and Express.
bulletImprovements.improved: Architected and optimized RESTful backend API services in Express, driving a 30% latency reduction across core node endpoints.
bulletImprovements.justification: Transformed a simple statement of passive tools into a concrete optimization metric showing performance scaling.
